disclosureBoundary.interfaceRule: Interface surfaces may expose event ids, proof roots, docs links, runbook links, redaction posture, source-safety class, correlation ids, state labels, and summary counts; they must not expose secrets, provider tokens, wallet private material, protected source, raw protected prompts, buyer repository private data, raw protected model responses, or unpaid AssetPack source.

rows.payloadRule: Interface payloads may expose event ids, proof roots, docs links, runbook links, redaction posture, source-safety class, correlation ids, state labels, and summary counts only.
rows.failClosedResult: terminal interface integration blocks when docs, telemetry, runbook, redaction, proof-root, or source-safety bindings are incomplete

validationCommands: pnpm --dir uapi exec jest --runTestsByPath tests/auxillariesWorkspacePanels.test.tsx tests/auxillariesContent.access.test.tsx --runInBand
